title: Kieran Greer
text: Home * People * Kieran Greer Kieran Greer [1] Kieran Greer , a British computer scientist, researcher in artificial intelligence and cognition , and programmer. He completed a DPhil in 1998 at the University of Ulster at Jordanstown with the thesis A Neural Network Based Search Heuristic and its Application to Computer Chess [2] . He introduced the related Chessmaps heuristic , which is applied in his ChessMaps chess playing program, written in C# [3] . Kieran Greer holds a patent of a Chess variant with mined squares [4] .
